title: AutoReplants
description: A client-side Fabric mod that automatically replants crops when you break them while holding a hoe.
body:
# AutoReplants

A lightweight client-side Fabric mod that automatically replants crops when you break them while holding a hoe.

## How It Works

Simply hold any hoe in your hand and break a crop. If you have the matching seeds in your hotbar, the crop will be replanted automatically.

## Supported Crops

- Wheat
- Carrots
- Potatoes
- Beetroots
- Nether Wart
- Torchflower
- Pitcher Plant

## Supported Hoes

- Wooden Hoe
- Stone Hoe
- Iron Hoe
- Golden Hoe
- Diamond Hoe
- Netherite Hoe

## Features

- **Client-side only** - Works on any server without server-side installation
- **No configuration needed** - Just install and play
- **Works at any growth stage** - Replants crops regardless of how grown they are
- **Hotbar-based** - Only uses seeds from your hotbar for quick access
